creator: rpolzer@mucke-novak.de
text:
"make fetch" in the ksh93 port shows that none of the package sites still contain the requested package.

Fix: 

Apparently, ksh93 got updated upstream and the port needs updating accordingly.
How-To-Repeat: tnd37# [ksh93] make fetch
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> INIT.2010-03-01.tgz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/ksh93.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.research.att.com/~gsf/download/tgz/.
fetch: http://www.research.att.com/~gsf/download/tgz/INIT.2010-03-01.tgz: Gone
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ksh93/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ksh93/INIT.2010-03-01.tgz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ksh93 and try again.
*** Error code 1
